title: UN Charter signed

title: PRC seated at the United Nations
summary: China's representation in universal institutions shifts to the PRC.

title: Hong Kong handover

title: China joins the WTO
summary: China enters the multilateral trade law system.

title: Anti-Secession Law adopted

title: Peaceful development white paper
summary: China articulates a comprehensive peaceful development narrative.

title: Belt and Road Initiative announced
summary: BRI begins as a major ordering project.

summary: China sets out objections to arbitral jurisdiction.

summary: The initiative receives a formal policy architecture.

title: AIIB Articles signed

title: South China Sea arbitral award issued

title: Xi Jinping speaks at Davos
summary: China presents itself as a defender of globalization.

title: China and the WTO white paper
summary: Official account of WTO compliance and reform position.

title: White paper on China-US trade consultations
summary: Trade conflict becomes central to China's critique of unilateralism.

title: Export Control Law adopted

title: MOFCOM blocking rules issued
summary: China creates blocking mechanisms for foreign extraterritorial measures.

title: Anti-Foreign Sanctions Law adopted

title: New Taiwan white paper released

title: Global Security Initiative concept paper issued
summary: China offers a branded security governance framework.

title: Saudi-Iran rapprochement facilitated in Beijing
summary: China highlights mediation as order-building practice.

title: Community of shared future white paper
summary: Official normative account of China's global-order proposal.

title: BRI white paper released
summary: BRI is framed as a pillar of a shared future.

title: China participates in ICJ climate advisory proceedings
summary: China engages legal argument on climate obligations and development equity.

title: Macau Basic Law adopted
